scripts.dev: concurrently "sh -c 'vite_port=${VITE_PORT:-5199}; echo \"Starting Vite on localhost:\$vite_port.\"; vite --strictPort --port \$vite_port'" "sh -c 'dashboard_port=${DASHBOARD_PORT:-7888}; vite_port=${VITE_PORT:-5199}; echo \"Waiting for Vite on localhost:\$vite_port...\"; i=0; max=150; until curl -fsS http://localhost:\$vite_port >/dev/null 2>&1; do i=\$((i+1)); if [ \"\$i\" -ge \"\$max\" ]; then echo \"Vite did not become healthy within 30s\"; exit 1; fi; sleep 0.2; done; echo \"Vite healthy; serving dashboard at http://localhost:\$dashboard_port.\"; cd ../.. && SPA_PROXY_URL=http://localhost:\$vite_port bun --watch run cli/selftune/dashboard-server.ts --port \$dashboard_port --runtime-mode dev-server'"
